Name: GUARD_LEVEL_MOTION_PARAM
Description: Defines guard impact levels and their corresponding guard reaction motion categories.

Fields.Name: Reaction: Very Small
Fields.Description: Guard reaction level used for extremely weak impacts.

Fields.Name: Reaction: Small
Fields.Description: Guard reaction level used for light impacts.

Fields.Name: Reaction: Medium
Fields.Description: Guard reaction level used for standard or medium-strength impacts.

Fields.Name: Reaction: Large
Fields.Description: Guard reaction level used for strong impacts.

Fields.Name: Reaction: Very Large
Fields.Description: Guard reaction level used for very powerful impacts.

Fields.Name: Reaction: Massive
Fields.Description: Guard reaction level used for extremely powerful or overwhelming impacts.

Fields.Name: Reaction: Deflect
Fields.Description: Guard reaction level used when an attack is deflected or bounces off the guard.
